purpose: Backend-ready research metadata for a reviewed inspiration library. This file is not a license grant and is not a runtime hotlink feed.

validation_summary.note: Balenciaga and Stone Island product pages were verified through an official-page web render because local Playwright received Akamai access-denied or temporary maintenance responses. Their first-party image assets were independently fetched successfully.

rights_policy.note: Source and image URLs are recorded for review and provenance only. Obtain written permission or replace each image with a licensed/project-authored derivative before downloading, caching, redistributing, or rendering it in the product. Re-check URLs and terms before use.

items.title: 3XL Sneaker in Black
items.description: A low sports-derived sneaker whose oversized sole, layered upper, and deliberate worn finish make scale and surface the primary study.
items.image_alt: Black Balenciaga 3XL sneaker in front three-quarter product view
items.silhouette: low profile with an oversized, extended sole platform
items.rights_note: Official product imagery is all-rights-reserved discovery metadata; do not download, cache, redistribute, or hotlink without written permission.
items.source_note: Product copy and a first-party Kering DAM asset were verified from the official rendered page on 2026-07-17; local Playwright received Balenciaga's Akamai access-denied response.
